slides.text: GPT-5.6 is live for everyone today. The real question isn't how powerful it is — it's whether anything changes for you.
slides.image_prompt: A vertical viral Instagram news post. A full frame high quality photograph, cropped to the top ~70% of the frame, of a single laptop and a phone side by side on a clean desk, both freshly showing a generic AI chat app with a small subtle 'new version available' banner glowing at the top of each screen — a believable just-went-live moment, not any real product's actual screen; soft morning light, shallow depth of field. Along the top edge of the photo, lay the connected reference image Straw_Motion_Logo horizontally, small and subtle in scale — no wider than roughly a third of the frame width — so it stays a quiet brand mark and never competes with the headline or stat callout for attention. Render the logo exactly as provided in the reference image: do not change its shape, proportions, or color in any way, and do not restyle it to match the scene. A soft dark vignette sits behind it for legibility against the photo. Below the photo, filling the bottom ~30% of the frame, is a solid white rounded card sitting on top of the image like a native app UI panel, full width, edge to edge. Inside the card, top-left, is a pill-shaped badge — a fully rounded, stadium-shaped outline with a thin black border and a white fill — containing the text "Unhypped News" centered inside it, set in Inter font, black text. Render the text inside the pill exactly as "Unhypped News" — capital U, capital N, every other letter lowercase. Never render it in all-caps/uppercase lettering, no matter the surrounding typography style. Positioned next to the pill is a single tiny OpenAI product logo, since this story is about one company. Below that, in large bold black display type, is the stat callout "It's live.", and beneath it, in smaller near-black sentence-case text, the supporting line "GPT-5.6 is live for everyone today. The real question isn't how powerful it is — it's whether anything changes for you." All text on the card — inside the "Unhypped News" pill, the stat callout, and the supporting line — is set in Inter. Clean editorial social media news page layout. Photorealistic, crisp bold typography overlay for the photo, clean flat UI-card typography for the card.

slides.text: In plain terms: it follows long instructions better, drifts off task less, and makes fewer things up. The stuff you feel.

Along the top edge of the photo, lay the connected reference image Straw_Motion_Logo horizontally, small and subtle in scale — no wider than roughly a third of the frame width — so it stays a quiet brand mark and never competes with the headline or stat callout for attention. Render the text inside the pill exactly as "Unhypped News" — capital U, capital N, every other letter lowercase. Never render it in all-caps/uppercase lettering, no matter the surrounding typography style. Positioned next to the pill is a single tiny OpenAI product logo, since this story is about one company. The stuff you feel." All text on the card — inside the "Unhypped News" pill, the stat callout, and the supporting line — is set in Inter. Clean editorial social media news page layout.
